title: Error when casting to typedef with parameterized logic

features.name: parameter type with typedef array of parameterized type
features.description: Code should include a typedef that uses a parameter type to define a packed array, combined with the parameter type declaration
features.snippet: module t #(parameter type data_t = logic) (input data_t[7:0] in_data); typedef data_t[7:0] in_data_t; endmodule

features.name: static cast to typedef of parameterized type array
features.description: Code should include a static type cast expression using a typedef that wraps a parameterized type array
features.snippet: typedef data_t[7:0] in_data_t; in_data_t out_data; always_comb out_data = in_data_t'(in_data);

features.name: type alias for parameterized packed array
features.description: Code should include a type alias created from a parameterized type forming a packed array used in module ports
features.snippet: parameter type data_t = logic; typedef data_t[7:0] in_data_t;
